scope.target: Adjust dev-workflow toward core orchestration, local capability profile, and fallback playbooks.
scope.dependency_radius: Dev workflow skill behavior, routing quality boundary, and human guide.
constraints: Keep current local skill routing available through a profile.
Do not claim standalone fallback equals specialist skill quality.
Keep agent-facing references in English and human guide in Traditional Chinese.

inputs.architecture_target: Publishable dev-workflow core with repo-local profile and fallback boundaries.
user_constraints: The skill exists to organize existing skills, so quality without those skills must be represented honestly.

steps: Update skill.yaml to define core, profile, and fallback modes.
Refactor routing playbook around generic capability slots.
Add local capability profile mapping to current repository skills.
Add skill discovery rules for repositories that have similar downstream skills.
Add fallback playbooks for missing downstream skills.
Add runtime coordination guidance for Codex Goal and Claude workflow prompts.
Update the human guide with quality boundaries.
validation: rg skill discovery, capability profile, fallback, and runtime coordination references.
deferred_items: External package structure and release metadata.

results.summary: Adjusted dev-workflow into a core/profile/discovery/fallback design and documented runtime coordination prompts for Codex Goal and Claude workflow usage.
tests_run: rg skill discovery, capability profile, fallback, and runtime coordination references
